version_description: Was looking for this song and found this tab.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Credit to : http://bettyloumusic.com/illbeyoureverything.htm

I’ll be your everything (1990)    (video)


[Intro]

[ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]       
[ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse]

[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]
1.     So long that I've waited for a girl[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
    to come into my life and in my world.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
    I can't explain my feelings for you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
    I guess you're just all my dreams come true.[/tab]



[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
    And I'll be your lover, your lover,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]
    and I'll be your best friend, oh I'll be your friend.[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]G[/ch]
    I'll be there when you're needing me,[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
    I'll be your everything, your everything.[/tab]


[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
    I'll be your everything,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
I'll be all that you want and all that you need ![/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
    I'll be your everything.[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
I'll give you all that I have, my love, my life, and me,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
I'll be your everything.[/tab]


[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
2.      Now that we're together at last,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
    we shouldn't think about our problems in the past,[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]Em[/ch]
    'cause true love takes a miracle to find.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                               [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
    I guess that I've been blessed 'cause I've got you by my side.[/tab]


[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
    And I'll be your lover, your lover,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]
    and I'll be your best friend, oh I'll be your friend.[/tab]

[tab]                                [ch]G[/ch]
    I'll be there when you're needing me,[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
    I'll be your everything, your everything.[/tab]


[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
    I'll be your everything,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
I'll give you all that I can, and all the love you need ![/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]
I'll be your everything.[/tab]


[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                                        [ch]C[/ch]
    When you're lost and you're down, and you're seeing darkness,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                        [ch]C[/ch]
    and there's no one there that can be found.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D#[/ch]                                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
    Just turn around, I'll be there holding out my arms for you,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                                          [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
    just reach for me, (from here capo 6th) I’ll be the one to set you free.[/tab]


[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
    I'll be your everything,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
I'll be all that you want and all that you need ![/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
    I'll be your everything.[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
I'll give you all that I have, my love, my life, and me.[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
I'll be your everything.                                   + I’ll be your everything ![/tab]



(orig. = capo 5th)    (Tommy Page)
